message.example: Ok but some changes are required

salesChannels.description: Sales Channels related to the Account. See [Sales Channel](commerce#tag/Sales-Channel)

commerceId.description: Id of the `Sales Channel` in Janis Commerce Service. See [Sales Channel](commerce#tag/Sales-Channel)

storeId.description: The id of the PIM Integration store related with the Sales Channel

publishCatalog.description: Setting that indicates if the Account has catalog publishing enabled. By enabling this setting, you are activating the publication of all entities in Janis Catalog service.

FormattedSalesChannels.description: Sales Channels related to the account. See [Sales Channel](v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel)

commerceId.description: Id of the `Sales Channel` in Janis Commerce Service. See [Sales Channel](v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel)

storeId.description: The id of the PIM Integration store related with the Sales Channel.

isRequired.description: Determines if the attribute is required

appliesToSkus.description: Determines if the attribute applies to skus or products

defaultValue.description:
The default value for the **Product** or **Sku** if no value is defined.
When `options` are defined, `defaultValue` must be one of them.

id.description: The id of the attribute in the integration platform.

attributeName.description: The name of the attribute in the integration platform.

catalogField.description: The name of the field in catalog.

mappingSchemaCategory.description: View schema for Attributes according to a Product

rootComponent.description: The component of the view to be rendered. Always set as 'FormSection'.

source.description: The source endpoint of the form.

sourceEndpointParameters.description: The source endpoint parameters of the form.

target.description: The target endpoint of the form.

targetEndpointParameters.description: The target endpoint parameters of the form.

fieldsGroup.description:
The name of the group of mapping fields, if there is one or it is "generic".
Within each item of the array, there will be the name of the group and the fields.

items.description: Object containing the group name and fields

fields.description: the fields of the fields group

component.description: View component to use in the table field

noLabel.description: The properties to hide the label of the field

canChangeElements.description: Determines if the fields array can change the elements

fields.description: The fields that will show in the form

component.description: View component to use in the table field

translateLabels.description: Indicates whether or not the labels should be translated

options.description: The options available for the value of the Attribute

scope.description: The scope for the options. Always set as 'local'.

items.description: The possible options of the select
